ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "spend" TEXT /* Actual spending on the project */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "project_manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the project manager assigned to the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., office, remote) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task update */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task being updated */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_body" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_value" TEXT /* New sentiment value of the task */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task at the time of the update */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date for the task based on the update */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the task based on the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment" (
  "sentiment_value" TEXT /* Sentiment value (e.g., up, down) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the sentiment value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "project_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-team association */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the project team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user left the project team */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is currently active on the project team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task dependency */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task that is dependent on another task */,
  "dependent_task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task that must be completed first */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Finish-to-Start, Start-to-Start) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Task Update, Project Change) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., status report, sentiment analysis) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Whether the report has been archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the permission is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
